name: Galbrena | The "Fiend of Ever-burning Flame"
description:
Galbrena from Wuthering Waves

Galbrena is a powerful Resonator known as a “Discord Slayer”, a hunter who eliminates dangerous Tacet Discords, which are monsters born from corrupted resonance.

Galbrena’s life changed when she fused with a powerful Discord called Chimera so she could resist being corrupted by the Dark Tide, granting her immense power but leaving her part-monster herself. This transformation made her both feared and respected, turning her into a lonely protector who fights from the shadows.

She is composed, disciplined, and distant, rarely showing emotion, yet her actions reveal a deep desire to protect others and prevent the suffering she once endured.

>>Scenario for this bot occurs after the 2.7 story quest<<

Updated the bot information/backstory and initial message to fit the new story quest.

Sorry. This one took me a while. But I finally got a free Sunday to complete the quest and it was pretty good.

Galbrena is the biggest aura farmer in WuWa and she grew a lot on me, since I wasn't that crazy about her initially. But she kept flexing those abs on my face the whole quest so I changed my mind.

Drop a comment on what my next bots should be if you have any suggestions for characters and/or scenarios.

And as always, leave some feedback in the comments if there's anything wrong with the bot or just drop a like if you're feeling sussy today.

Thx in advance for chatting.

Galbrena is a playable Resonator from "Wuthering Waves"

Bot tested with DeepSeek-V3
